description: Deep-dive into a single CNV test run with validation results, Prometheus metrics, and per-worker analysis

settings.script: def nsCount = 1; def vmsPerNs = _value; if (doc.containsKey('runtimeConfig.namespaceCount.keyword') && doc['runtimeConfig.namespaceCount.keyword'].size() > 0) { nsCount = Integer.parseInt(doc['runtimeConfig.namespaceCount.keyword'].value); } if (doc.containsKey('runtimeConfig.vmsPerNamespace.keyword') && doc['runtimeConfig.vmsPerNamespace.keyword'].size() > 0) { vmsPerNs = Integer.parseInt(doc['runtimeConfig.vmsPerNamespace.keyword'].value); } return nsCount * vmsPerNs;

targets.query: uuid.keyword: $uuid AND (level.keyword: error OR level.keyword: fatal OR level.keyword: warning)
uuid.keyword: $uuid AND metricName.keyword: podCPU AND labels.node.keyword: $worker
uuid.keyword: $uuid AND metricName.keyword: podMemory AND labels.node.keyword: $worker
uuid.keyword: $uuid AND metricName.keyword: nodeCPU AND labels.instance.keyword: $worker
uuid.keyword: $uuid AND metricName.keyword: nodeMemoryAvailable AND labels.instance.keyword: $worker
uuid.keyword: $uuid AND metricName.keyword: nodeDiskWriteOpsSec AND labels.instance.keyword: $worker
uuid.keyword: $uuid AND metricName.keyword: nodeDiskReadOpsSec AND labels.instance.keyword: $worker
uuid.keyword: $uuid AND metricName.keyword: rxNetworkBytes AND labels.instance.keyword: $worker
uuid.keyword: $uuid AND metricName.keyword: txNetworkBytes AND labels.instance.keyword: $worker

list.definition: {"find": "terms", "field": "labels.node.keyword", "query": "metricName.keyword: nodeRoles AND labels.role.keyword: worker AND uuid.keyword: $uuid"}
list.label: Worker
list.name: worker
list.query: {"find": "terms", "field": "labels.node.keyword", "query": "metricName.keyword: nodeRoles AND labels.role.keyword: worker AND uuid.keyword: $uuid"}

title: CNV Run Detail v2
